candidates.title: Catalog designer needed — B2B electrical/elevator parts distributor (100+ pages)
candidates.brief: Upwork · Hourly About us Beta Electrical Supply is an active wholesale distributor of electrical and elevator parts. We sell to contractors and service companies. We have a logo and a product list. We need an experienced catalog designer to rebuild our product catalog from the ground up — better than what we have, better than our competitors. Who reads this catalog Our typical buyer is an elevator service technician, maintenance supervisor, or electrical contractor. They reach for our catalog when they need to spec a replacement part fast, prepare a quote, or verify Beta is a real supplier before placing a first order. They read it both in print and as a PDF on their phone in the field. Scope Full catalog redesign — roughly 100 pages, final count to be decided in kickoff. Open to a tighter, more curated version (40-60 pages) if that better suits our buyer. Front cover, back cover, intro

candidates.title: Belizz Bamboo Pad Reseller Partners
candidates.brief: I now want to open solid, long-term partnerships across Asia with businesses that can take bulk stock and resell it under the Belizz brand or white-label, whichever best fits your market. Who I need • Established distributors with a sales network in pharmacies, supermarkets, or specialty eco-stores. • Online marketplace operators or high-traffic e-commerce sellers who can list and promote the pads directly to consumers. What I bring to the table • Consistent supply of finished Belizz bamboo sanitary pads, packed and ready for retail. • Flexible minimum order quantities to help you test the line before scaling up. What I’m looking for from you • The ability to commit to regular bulk orders. • Local marketing or platform reach to move product quickly. • Reliable payment and import handling in your territory. Next steps Tell me about your company profile, sales channels, and the approximate

candidates.title: SCUBE Solar Lighting Brochure Design -- 2
candidates.tools: Photoshop · Illustrator · InDesign — for print-ready CMYK output and scalable vector artwork
candidates.brief: Project Title: Design Professional Product Brochure for Solar Lighting Brand (SCUBE) Project Description: We are a fast-growing solar lighting brand based in India, focused on high-quality outdoor solar products such as solar street lights, wall lights, and garden lights. We are looking for an experienced graphic designer to create a **premium, modern, and professional product brochure** for our brand "SCUBE". This brochure will be used for: * Dealer distribution * B2B marketing * Government / institutional proposals * Online sharing (PDF format) --- Scope of Work: Design a clean and visually appealing brochure (8–12 pages) that includes: 1. Cover Page Brand logo (SCUBE) Tagline: "Powering the Future with Solar" Premium and modern design look 2. About Us Page Brand story Vision and mission (content will be provided) 3. Product Categories Solar Street Lights Solar Wall Lights Solar Flood

candidates.title: Modernized InDesign Catalogue (Massey Harpers Game & Country)
candidates.tools: InDesign · Photoshop — Master-page template system, multi-page A4 booklet and print-ready PDF — explicitly requires .indd deliverables.
candidates.brief: Design a product catalogue and template pages for Massey Harpers Game and Country in Adobe InDesign. Deliverables: a multi-page printed A4 booklet and downloadable PDF with reusable page designs. Front cover requires a full-page hero image with company logo, catalogue name and year. Back cover needs a full-page image with logo and contact details (phone, email, website, physical address). Informational pages must include a contents list with page numbers, company biography, detailed contact information and terms/conditions space. Feed-page design should follow the existing format with space for 2–4 logos, a feed-guide table, and a feed-experts section (expert image, name, phone, email, job title, plus notes/disclaimer space). Deliver a minimum of five different product/inside page designs for grid layouts, supporting banner ads, disclaimers, special offers, product ranges and full/half-p

candidates.title: Luna AI Shopping Assistant Development
candidates.tools: InDesign · Illustrator — for scalable vector artwork and multi-page layout
candidates.brief: I have the core SmartGuide AI Agent & Management Suite running—modern UI, admin dashboard, asynchronous API engine, and the Model Context Protocol server are already in place. What I now need is for you to bring the personalized shopping-assistance layer to life, with Luna—the enthusiastic smartphone advisor—as the primary conversational persona. Your mandate is to wire Luna into the existing stack so she can: • Offer context-aware product recommendations drawn from our smartphone catalogue • Query the live stock service in real time • Create and confirm customer booking reservations on the spot The conversational logic must leverage Generative AI with Retrieval-Augmented Generation; our product data, benchmark feeds, and availability endpoints are already exposed through a FastAPI gateway. You will design the prompt strategy, RAG pipeline, and any embedding or vector-store choices, then
